_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

data.name: video_metrics
constraints: FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES event(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

data.name: clips
constraints: FOREIGN KEY (draft_id) REFERENCES drafts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "event" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "kind" INTEGER NOT NULL, "tags" TEXT NOT NULL, "content" TEXT NOT NULL, "sig" TEXT NOT NULL, "sources" TEXT NULL, "expire_at" INTEGER NULL, "d_tag" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "user_profiles" ("pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, "display_name" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NULL, "about" TEXT NULL, "picture" TEXT NULL, "banner" TEXT NULL, "website" TEXT NULL, "nip05" TEXT NULL, "lud16" TEXT NULL, "lud06" TEXT NULL, "raw_data" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "event_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "last_fetched" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("pubkey"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "video_metrics" ("event_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "loop_count" INTEGER NULL, "likes" INTEGER NULL, "views" INTEGER NULL, "comments" INTEGER NULL, "avg_completion" REAL NULL, "has_proofmode" INTEGER NULL, "has_device_attestation" INTEGER NULL, "has_pgp_signature" INTEGER NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES event(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "profile_statistics" ("pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, "video_count" INTEGER NULL, "follower_count" INTEGER NULL, "following_count" INTEGER NULL, "total_views" INTEGER NULL, "total_likes" INTEGER NULL, "cached_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("pubkey"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "hashtag_stats" ("hashtag" TEXT NOT NULL, "video_count" INTEGER NULL, "total_views" INTEGER NULL, "total_likes" INTEGER NULL, "cached_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "notifications" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "from_pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, "target_event_id" TEXT NULL, "target_pubkey" TEXT NULL, "content" TEXT NULL, "timestamp" INTEGER NOT NULL, "is_read" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_read" IN (0, 1)), "cached_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pending_uploads" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "local_video_path" TEXT NOT NULL, "nostr_pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "cloudinary_public_id" TEXT NULL, "video_id" TEXT NULL, "cdn_url" TEXT NULL, "error_message" TEXT NULL, "upload_progress" REAL NULL, "thumbnail_path" TEXT NULL, "title" TEXT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "hashtags" TEXT NULL, "nostr_event_id" TEXT NULL, "completed_at" INTEGER NULL, "retry_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "video_width" INTEGER NULL, "video_height" INTEGER NULL, "video_duration_millis" INTEGER NULL, "proof_manifest_json" TEXT NULL, "streaming_mp4_url" TEXT NULL, "streaming_hls_url" TEXT NULL, "fallback_url" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "personal_reactions" ("target_event_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "reaction_event_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "user_pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("target_event_id", "user_pubkey"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "personal_reposts" ("addressable_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "repost_event_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "original_author_pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, "user_pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("addressable_id", "user_pubkey"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pending_actions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "target_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "author_pubkey" TEXT NULL, "addressable_id" TEXT NULL, "target_kind" INTEGER NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "user_pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "retry_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "last_error" TEXT NULL, "last_attempt_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "nip05_verifications" ("pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, "nip05" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "verified_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "expires_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("pubkey"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "drafts" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "description" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "publish_status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft', "publish_attempts" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "publish_error" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "last_modified" INTEGER NOT NULL, "data" TEXT NOT NULL, "rendered_file_path" TEXT NULL, "rendered_thumbnail_path" TEXT NULL, "custom_thumbnail_path" TEXT NULL, "owner_pubkey" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "clips" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "draft_id" TEXT NULL, "order_index" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "duration_ms" INTEGER NOT NULL, "recorded_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "data" TEXT NOT NULL, "file_path" TEXT NULL, "thumbnail_path" TEXT NULL, "owner_pubkey" TEXT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), FOREIGN KEY (draft_id) REFERENCES drafts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "direct_messages" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "conversation_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sender_pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, "content" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "reply_to_id" TEXT NULL, "gift_wrap_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "subject" TEXT NULL, "tags_json" TEXT NULL, "message_kind" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 14, "file_type" TEXT NULL, "encryption_algorithm" TEXT NULL, "decryption_key" TEXT NULL, "decryption_nonce" TEXT NULL, "file_hash" TEXT NULL, "original_file_hash" TEXT NULL, "file_size" INTEGER NULL, "dimensions" TEXT NULL, "blurhash" TEXT NULL, "thumbnail_url" TEXT NULL, "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "owner_pubkey" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "dm_message_reactions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "conversation_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "target_message_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "target_message_author" TEXT NOT NULL, "reactor_pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, "emoji" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "gift_wrap_id" TEXT NULL, "owner_pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_deleted" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_deleted" IN (0, 1)), "rumor_event_json" TEXT NULL, "publish_status" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id", "owner_pubkey"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "conversations" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "participant_pubkeys" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_group" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_group" IN (0, 1)), "last_message_content" TEXT NULL, "last_message_timestamp" INTEGER NULL, "last_message_sender_pubkey" TEXT NULL, "subject" TEXT NULL, "is_read" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_read" IN (0, 1)), "last_read_timestamp" INTEGER NULL, "current_user_has_sent" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("current_user_has_sent" IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "owner_pubkey" TEXT NULL, "dm_protocol" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "outgoing_dms" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "conversation_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "recipient_pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, "content" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "rumor_event_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "message_kind" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 14, "reply_to_id" TEXT NULL, "recipient_wrap_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "self_wrap_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "recipient_wrap_event_id" TEXT NULL, "self_wrap_event_id" TEXT NULL, "retry_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "recipient_wrap_last_error" TEXT NULL, "self_wrap_last_error" TEXT NULL, "last_attempt_at" INTEGER NULL, "queued_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "owner_pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pending_view_events" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "video_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "video_pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, "video_vine_id" TEXT NULL, "user_pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, "watch_duration_ms" INTEGER NOT NULL, "total_duration_ms" INTEGER NULL, "loop_count" INTEGER NULL, "traffic_source" TEXT NOT NULL, "source_detail" TEXT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "retry_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "last_error" TEXT NULL, "last_attempt_at" INTEGER NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pending_product_events" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "event_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "payload_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "attempt_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "next_attempt_at" INTEGER NULL, "last_error" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "pending_gift_wraps" ("gift_wrap_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_pubkey" TEXT NOT NULL, "raw_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "attempts" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "last_attempt_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("gift_wrap_id", "owner_pubkey"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "processed_gift_wraps" ("gift_wrap_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "processed_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "owner_pubkey" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("gift_wrap_id"));
